code: import React from'react';import'./StatusBadge.css';import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function StatusBadge(_ref){let{status}=_ref;const map={'Pending':{cls:'pending',icon:'⏳'},'Under Review':{cls:'review',icon:'🔍'},'Approved':{cls:'approved',icon:'✅'},'Rejected':{cls:'rejected',icon:'❌'},'Accepted':{cls:'approved',icon:'🎉'},'Completed':{cls:'approved',icon:'✅'}};const info=map[status]||{cls:'pending',icon:'❓'};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"status-badge ".concat(info.cls),children:[info.icon," ",status]});}export default StatusBadge;
